---
title: "Who likes extraverts? Testing the interplay between perceiver needs and target appearance in impression formation"
authors: "Jaeger, B., Jones, A. L., Satchell, L., Schild, C., & van Leeuwen, F."
year: 2026
date: 2026-01-01
pub-journal: "International Review of Social Psychology"
volume: "39(1): 2"
pages: "1–13"
doi: "10.5334/irsp.996"
pdf: "assets/papers/2026/jaegeretal2026.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
